targets.rawSql: SELECT sc.name AS "Característica", ss.name AS "Subcaracterística", sm.name AS "Medida", sm.key AS "Chave da Medida" FROM characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic_subcharacteristics csc ON csc.supportedcharacteristic_id = sc.id JOIN subcharacteristics_supportedsubcharacteristic ss ON ss.id = csc.supportedsubcharacteristic_id JOIN subcharacteristics_supportedsubcharacteristic_measures ssm ON ssm.supportedsubcharacteristic_id = ss.id JOIN measures_supportedmeasure sm ON sm.id = ssm.supportedmeasure_id ORDER BY sc.name, ss.name, sm.name

SELECT sm.name AS "Medida", smet.name AS "Métrica", smet.metric_type AS "Tipo" FROM measures_supportedmeasure sm JOIN measures_supportedmeasure_metrics smm ON smm.supportedmeasure_id = sm.id JOIN metrics_supportedmetric smet ON smet.id = smm.supportedmetric_id ORDER BY sm.name, smet.name

SELECT src.name AS "Característica Origem", tgt.name AS "Característica Alvo", bm.relation_type AS "Relação" FROM characteristics_balancematrix bm JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic src ON src.id = bm.source_characteristic_id JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic tgt ON tgt.id = bm.target_characteristic_id ORDER BY src.name, tgt.name

SELECT p.name AS "Produto", rc.name AS "Configuração", rc.created_at::date AS "Criada em" FROM release_configuration_releaseconfiguration rc JOIN organizations_product p ON p.id = rc.product_id ORDER BY p.name, rc.created_at DESC
